name: Vibe Coding
description: An AI-assisted coding blueprint using VS Code, Cursor, Git, Node.js, Python, Codex CLI, and optional assistant extensions.

apps.reason: Stable editor baseline for coding workflows.
AI-focused editor option for assisted coding.
Required for version control and reviewing generated changes.
Needed for many frontend, CLI, and tooling projects.
Needed for Python projects and many automation workflows.

config_recommendations: Keep Git status clean before asking AI tools to modify a project.
Review every generated diff before running commands or committing.
Use project instructions to document local conventions.
risk_warnings: AI coding tools can produce incorrect code and unsafe commands.
Review privacy settings before sending repository context to external services.
not_recommended: Using AI-generated commands without reading them first.
next_steps: Install the required editor, runtime, and Git tools manually.
Choose one AI assistant workflow to start.
Run StackPilot again after installation to verify tool detection.
